languages.text: "Так точно, Ваша Светлость! Пока вы с нами, нам ничего не угрожает, а мы с вами навсегда. Вопрос решен, более я его не подниму".
"Right you are, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! As long as you are with us, we are safe, and we are with you forever. The matter is settled. I won't raise it again."
languages.original_text: "Так точно, Ваша Светлость! Пока вы с нами, нам ничего не угрожает, а мы с вами навсегда. Вопрос решен, более я его не подниму".

traits.locale_text: "Right you are, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! As long as you are with us, we are safe, and we are with you forever. The matter is settled. I won't raise it again."
"Right you are, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! As long as you are with us, we are safe, and we are with you forever. The matter is settled. I won't raise it again."

"But... without it? What would have happened to us then? After all, anyone could have landed on Zarkov! Someone who would have refused to listen to us. Who wouldn't have wanted to help us. Or who didn't have your influence. It's frightening to think of such a fate. It makes me doubly grateful that the God-Emperor led you to us."
"Right you are, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! As long as you are with us, we are safe, and we are with you forever. The matter is settled. I won't raise it again."
"Right you are, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! As long as you are with us, we are safe, and we are with you forever. The matter is settled. I won't raise it again."

languages.text: 「でも…あの時、それがなかったら？私たちはどうなっていたでしょう？だって、ザルコフに降りてきたのは誰でもよかったわけですから。私たちを無視する人、私たちを助けてくれなかった人、そしてあなたのような影響力を持つ人。そんな運命を想像するだけで恐ろしいですよ。神皇帝があなたを導いてくれたことに、感謝の気持ちは倍増します」
languages.original_text: "But... without it? What would have happened to us then? After all, anyone could have landed on Zarkov! Someone who would have refused to listen to us. Who wouldn't have wanted to help us. Or who didn't have your influence. It's frightening to think of such a fate. It makes me doubly grateful that the God-Emperor led you to us."

languages.text: "Çok haklısınız {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Siz bizimle olduğunuz sürece güvendeyiz, biz de sonsuza dek sizinleyiz. Mesele kapanmıştır. Bir daha gündeme getirmeyeceğim."
languages.original_text: "Right you are, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! As long as you are with us, we are safe, and we are with you forever. The matter is settled. I won't raise it again."

traits.locale_text: "Çok haklısınız {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Siz bizimle olduğunuz sürece güvendeyiz, biz de sonsuza dek sizinleyiz. Mesele kapanmıştır. Bir daha gündeme getirmeyeceğim."

languages.text: “您说得对，大人！只要您与我们同在，我们便会安全无虞，而我们也将永远追随您。此事已了结，我不会再提了。”
languages.original_text: "Right you are, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! As long as you are with us, we are safe, and we are with you forever. The matter is settled. I won't raise it again."

traits.locale_text: “您说得对，大人！只要您与我们同在，我们便会安全无虞，而我们也将永远追随您。此事已了结，我不会再提了。”

languages.text: "Ihr habt recht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Solange Ihr bei uns seid, sind wir sicher und wir bleiben für immer bei Euch. Damit ist alles geregelt. Ich werde nicht wieder davon anfangen."
languages.original_text: "Right you are, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! As long as you are with us, we are safe, and we are with you forever. The matter is settled. I won't raise it again."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt recht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Solange Ihr bei uns seid, sind wir sicher und wir bleiben für immer bei Euch. Damit ist alles geregelt. Ich werde nicht wieder davon anfangen."

languages.text: « Vous avez raison, Votre Seigneurie ! Tant que vous êtes à nos côtés, nous ne craignons rien. Vous pouvez compter sur nous. Le sujet est clos. Je ne l'aborderai plus. »
languages.original_text: "Right you are, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! As long as you are with us, we are safe, and we are with you forever. The matter is settled. I won't raise it again."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez raison, Votre Seigneurie ! Tant que vous êtes à nos côtés, nous ne craignons rien. Vous pouvez compter sur nous. Le sujet est clos. Je ne l'aborderai plus. »

languages.text: «¡Toda la razón, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Mientras esté con nosotros, estamos seguros, y estaremos con usted siempre. El asunto queda zanjado. No volveré a hablar de ello».
languages.original_text: "Right you are, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! As long as you are with us, we are safe, and we are with you forever. The matter is settled. I won't raise it again."

traits.locale_text: «¡Toda la razón, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Mientras esté con nosotros, estamos seguros, y estaremos con usted siempre. El asunto queda zanjado. No volveré a hablar de ello».
